artifact.content_preview:
De : pierre.gagnon@ssc-spc.gc.ca
À : alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc : marie.lefebvre@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Objet : Demande d'ajout — Modernisation des postes de travail des utilisateurs
Date : 8 mars 2026

Bonjour Alice,

Je vous écris pour soumettre une demande d'ajout de portée au projet
NGIS Phase 3 de la part du gestionnaire de prestation de services.

Dans le cadre de la consolidation des sites B et C, plusieurs employés
des centres de données affectés devront être relocalisés au site A à
Gatineau. Le

extracted_tasks.text: Remplacement de 85 ordinateurs portables (modèles Dell Latitude ou équivalent)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Remplacement de 85 ordinateurs portables... livraison et configuration avant le 15 avril 2026

extracted_tasks.text: Remplacement de 40 postes de travail fixes dans les salles de serveurs consolidées
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Remplacement de 40 postes de travail fixes... livraison et configuration avant le 15 avril 2026

extracted_tasks.text: Examiner la demande d'ajout de portée et la soumettre au comité directeur
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Pourriez-vous examiner cette demande et la soumettre au comité directeur lors de la prochaine réunion du 10 mars ?

extracted_tasks.text: Décision : Proposition d'inclure le remplacement des équipements dans le projet NGIS Phase 3
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Le gestionnaire de prestation propose que le projet NGIS Phase 3 inclue également le remplacement de leurs équipements de travail

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "in_scope": [
    "Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure",
    "Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A",
    "Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A",
    "Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A",
    "Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites",
    "Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones",
    "BGP routing table migration and validation",
    "Network performance baseline testing post-migration",
    "Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to Site A",
    "AD schema extension and forest restructuring",
    "Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing",
    "Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD",
    "Project management, weekly status reports, and risk register maintenance",
    "Steering committee presentations and stakeholder communications"
  ],
  "out_of_scope": [
    "End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
    "Application modernization or re-platforming (lift and shift only)",
    "GC-Cloud workload migration (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)",
    "End-user training and departmental change management programs",
    "Procurement of new application licenses",
    "Network monitoring tool upgrades (NOC monitoring platform)"
  ],
  "deliverables": [
    "D-001: Project Management Plan",
    "D-002: Technical Design Document (TDD)",
    "D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package",
    "D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)",
    "D-005: User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan",
    "D-006: Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live)",
    "D-007: Post-Migration Validation Report",
    "D-008: Project Closure Report"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Total approved budget of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes",
    "Go-Live (D-006) must be achieved no later than April 30, 2026",
    "Final project closure date of June 30, 2026",
    "Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management",
    "Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security",
    "Compliance with Privacy Act and Official Languages Act",
    "Adherence to SSC Project Change Management Process for scope/schedule/budget changes",
    "Classification level: Protected B"
  ]
}
```

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "alignment_score": 0.0,
  "drift_type": "contradicts_scope",
  "detected_ask": "Remplacement de 85 ordinateurs portables et 40 postes de travail fixes (coût estimé 210 000 $ - 240 000 $).",
  "baseline_reference": "OUT OF SCOPE: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
  "suggested_action": "Reject the request as it is explicitly listed as 'Out of Scope'. Advise the stakeholder to submit a separate procurement request or project proposal through the standard departmental channels, as this would require a formal Change Request (CR) to increase the $2.4M budget and violates the current scope baseline.",
  "reasoning": "The request directly contradicts the 'Out of Scope' section of the baseline which explicitly excludes end-user device refresh/replacement. Furthermore, the requested delivery date (April 15) is dangerously close to the Go-Live constraint (April 30), and the estimated cost represents a ~10% budget increase which is not accounted for in the $2.4M fixed budget."
}
```

parsed_json.detected_ask: Remplacement de 85 ordinateurs portables et 40 postes de travail fixes (coût estimé 210 000 $ - 240 000 $).
parsed_json.baseline_reference: OUT OF SCOPE: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)
parsed_json.suggested_action: Reject the request as it is explicitly listed as 'Out of Scope'. Advise the stakeholder to submit a separate procurement request or project proposal through the standard departmental channels, as this would require a formal Change Request (CR) to increase the $2.4M budget and violates the current scope baseline.
parsed_json.reasoning: The request directly contradicts the 'Out of Scope' section of the baseline which explicitly excludes end-user device refresh/replacement. Furthermore, the requested delivery date (April 15) is dangerously close to the Go-Live constraint (April 30), and the estimated cost represents a ~10% budget increase which is not accounted for in the $2.4M fixed budget.
